## IR\_VERSION variable

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

The current IR format version. Centralized here so all canonicalizers and consumers reference a single source of truth.

**Signature:**

```typescript
IR_VERSION: "0.1.0"
```
